Hero.name: Felipe Gabriel
Hero.description: Building scalable web applications, robust DevOps pipelines, and intelligent automations that turn ideas into products — from code to cloud.

Expertise.title: Expertise & Stack
Expertise.description: Three pillars that guide every delivery — from concept to production.

fullstack.title: Full Stack Web Development
fullstack.description: End-to-end product engineering — from pixel-perfect interfaces to scalable architectures and APIs.

devops.title: DevOps & Infrastructure
devops.description: Cloud-native deployments, container orchestration, and zero-downtime CI/CD pipelines.

automations.title: Automations & Workflows
automations.description: Intelligent scripts and flows (no-code/low-code) that eliminate repetitive tasks and boost productivity.

Projects.title: Featured Projects & Automations
Projects.description: Real-world projects combining web products and automation with a focus on performance, integration, and delivery.

hubEcommerce.title: Integrated Management Portal (SaaS)
hubEcommerce.description: Complete financial management platform with real-time dashboard, automatic transaction reconciliation, and inventory control. Centralize all your business operations in an intuitive interface.

pwaClinics.title: High-Performance HealthTech Platform
pwaClinics.description: Complete platform for medical clinics with intelligent scheduling, patient management, testimonials, and specialties. Modern interface with PWA and conversion optimization.

onboardingAiCrm.title: Strategic Sales Ecosystem
onboardingAiCrm.description: Complete digital product launch system with AI, dynamic countdown, interactive FAQ, and lead nurturing automation. Transform visitors into customers with high conversion.

cicdAws.title: Intelligent Legal Management System
cicdAws.description: High-availability system for law firms with process automation, case management, and compliance. Cloud-native infrastructure with zero downtime and automatic scalability.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.description: Send a message and let's discuss how I can help with your next project.

left.title: Let's talk?
left.description: Briefly tell me what you need and I'll reply with the next steps. If you prefer, choose a channel below to reach me now.

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Briefly tell me about the project, goals, and deadlines.

validation.fillAll: Please fill in your Name, Email, and a more detailed message.

Footer.whatsappPrefill: Hi Felipe, I saw your portfolio and would like to talk about a project.
